title: Define LICHEN app-level inbound event source for Meshtastic gateway
description: The gateway now exposes and tests gateway_meshtastic_adapter_emit_text/status wrappers, but no production LICHEN app-level source currently calls them. Current L2 RX terminates at net_recv_data(), and the native message_received path is only the non-L2 LoRa compatibility path, so there is no semantic inbound message/status callback that can be wired without defining a source contract. Define/implement the no-hardware event source for inbound LICHEN messages and status, connect it to gateway_meshtastic_adapter_emit_text/status, and add qemu/native_sim tests proving the production path. Physical radio validation should remain a separate child if needed.
acceptance_criteria: A production no-hardware LICHEN message/status source invokes the Meshtastic gateway emit wrappers; qemu/native_sim tests prove text and status reach BLE FromRadio via that path; any physical-radio validation is split to a hardware child Bead.
